{{CargoRelic
|name=The Last Supper
|rank=S
|affct=ART
|birthday=03-09
|source=Fragment Crafting (18.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Wishing (0.68%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF)
|description=On Mar 9, AD 1498, Leonardo da Vinci completed the most important masterpiece of the Renaissance.

In the Santa Maria Delle Grazie, Leonardo da Vinci created a fresco themed on the Last Supper where Jesus shared his final meal with the Twelve Apostles. Jesus is seen sitting in the middle alone with the Twelve Apostles placed on either side. The bright light emanating from the windows behind him illuminates his solemn and sober face. The strong contrast of the background draws all focal points to Jesus. The restless apostles next to Jesus have different facial expressions and movements. Especially the panicked Judas, who knocked over the salt shaker with his elbow and leaned back with his face full of fear and anxiety. The painting marks the peak of Leonardo da Vinci's artistic achievement. 

[Basic Info]

Size: 420x910 cm<br>Theme: Bible stories<br>Collected by: Santa Maria delle Grazie, Milan
|fame=66
|art=100
|fth=51
|civ=62
|tech=53
|ss1=Fungus Farm Output +2%<br>Fungus Farm Max Cap +2%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail DEF +4<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Fungus Farm Output +4%<br>Fungus Farm Max Cap +4%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail DEF +8<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Fungus Farm Output +6%<br>Fungus Farm Max Cap +6%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail DEF +12<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Fungus Farm Output +10%<br>Fungus Farm Max Cap +10%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail DEF +20<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss5=Fungus Farm Output +14%<br>Fungus Farm Max Cap +14%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail DEF +28<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss6=Fungus Farm Output +20%<br>Fungus Farm Max Cap +20%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail DEF +40<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Fungus Farm Output +20%<br>Fungus Farm Max Cap +20%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail DEF +40<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50<br>Fungus Farm Output +20% (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|tadpolepond|btad output|30}}
|skill2={{Skills|fungusfarm|art|15}}
|skill3={{Skills|lumbercamp|art|15}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Orange Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Orange ART Relics]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Output Boost]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Skill]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]
[[Category:ART Boost]]
[[Category:Organ Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
